top_signals.title: Puig Falls After Estee Lauder Deal Fails
top_signals.summary: Puig Brands plunged on Friday following the collapse of a proposed combination with Estee Lauder Cos. that would have created one of the world’s largest fragrance and skincare companies. Deborah Aitken, Bloomberg Intelligence Luxury Goods Analyst discussed the merger with Scarlet Fu and Isabelle Lee. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
